translated: [CORNER: Closing] It's almost time to say goodbye to Love Live! Superstar!! Yuigaoka Lunchtime Broadcast Station, Lieraji.
We're always looking for your emails here at Lieraji.
We're currently accepting thoughts on our songs, the TV anime, and our live concerts,
as well as general mail like messages and questions for us.
We also have "Hamburg is Agree," where you share your little favorites,
and "Lunchtime Request," where you request Liella! songs to cheer you up.
Finally, there's "Open the Gate, Ouen the Yell,"
where we give you a push when you need some support.
We're waiting for lots of emails!
And now, here's the info for the next broadcast.
Episode 265, airing next Tuesday, March 24th, will feature Yabushima Akane, the voice of Mei Yoneme, as our guest.
Yep.
So, we talked a lot today, but...
how was it for you?
Man, it wasn't enough.
It really wasn't.
Still not enough.
Not enough at all!
Look, I still have so much left to say.
Yeah, yeah.
Because there's just so much to talk about.
Thank you, Mino-san.
Thank you so much.
Can we keep talking next week? I wonder if we can.
It looks like we'll be able to talk more next week too.
Then let's talk then!
Let's do it.
Yeah.
Otherwise, we'll just keep talking about our 7th Live impressions forever.
I honestly want to talk about it for the next three years.
Right?
The things we want to say about the live just keep piling up.
Everything ends up being about the 7th Live.
If we don't do Lieraji every single day, it might not be enough.
Let's do it every day then!
Shall we?
Yeah.
Let's do it.
We're doing it every day now!
Send us your mail!
Yep.
That's right.
Just kidding.
We're kidding.
Please tune in next week too!
We'll be waiting!
